---
title: "Presenter Info"
description: "Talk & poster guidelines, timing, AV setup, file formats."
date: 2026-02-13
categories: [presenters, logistics]
---

## Oral presentations
- Oral presentations will be 20 minutes of talk followed by 10 minutes of Q&A.

## Posters
- There will be two traditional in-person poster sessions and a short online "flash talk" poster session. 
- The in-person poster sessions will be held on the first floor of Stata Center. We recommend you print your poster on A1-sized paper. 
- The online poster session will consist of 10-minute pre-recorded flash talks followed by 5-minute live Q&A sessions. You can choose either poster or slides for your presentation.
